description_long: This house features a single-story, rectangular layout with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored with sections of exposed brick, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The property includes landscaped elements such as two prominent trees and some shrubbery, enhancing its curb appeal. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no visible porch or overhang. The overall structure is compact and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light walls, exposed brick, and large asymmetrical windows, surrounded by trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, a large window, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roofline, brick sections, and a single tree on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the backyard area, visible windows, and landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, brickwork, and a tree on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
